cell_type: Liver specific deletion of Mastl in hepatocytes induced abnormalities...
sample_source: To investigate whether Mastl is required for cell proliferation in vitro, we isolated MastlFLOX/FLOX mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs)...
age: To induce Mastl gene deletion in adult mice (8–10 weeks old)...
cell_line: Primary MastlFLOX/FLOX MEFs were isolated from E13.5 mouse embryos...
strain: The MastlNULL allele was then generated by crossing MastlFLOX mice with β-Actin-Cre transgenic mice (strain name: FVB/N-Tg(ACTB-cre)2Mrt/J; stock no.: 003376; The Jackson Laboratory)...
